#  About The Compliance Tab On Subcontractor Invoices With Procore Pay 
Table of Contents 
##  Considerations 
Before you get started, consider the following.
###  Prerequisites 
  * [Enable Procore Pay as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/enable-procore-pay)
  * [Create Compliance Templates for Projects as a Company Admin](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-compliance-tab-on-subcontractor-invoices-with-procore-pay/create-templates)
  * [Add Required Compliance Documents to Compliance Templates](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/about-the-compliance-tab-on-subcontractor-invoices-with-procore-pay/add-requirements)


###  Things to Consider 
  * To configure the compliance templates feature in the Payments tool, you must be a [Company Admin](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-company-admin) for the payor.
  * To complete actions in the Compliance tab of a subcontractor invoice, you must have [invoice administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payor-setup-guide/add-invoice-administrators) permissions on the Commitments tool in the payor's Procore project. For Procore Pay payees, [invoice contacts](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-an-invoice-contact) can only complete specific actions with the payor's permission. For details about specific actions, see [Procore Pay Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions).
